hooks.name: useToggle
hooks.description: Boolean state with toggle and explicit set.

hooks.name: useForm
hooks.description: Controlled form state with one change handler.
hooks.signature: useForm<T>(initialState: T): { values: T; handleChange: (e: ChangeEvent) => void; resetForm: () => void }

hooks.name: useLocalStorage
hooks.description: State persisted to localStorage.
hooks.signature: useLocalStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T): { value: T; setStoredValue: (value: T | ((val: T) => T)) => void }

hooks.name: useLocalStorageWithExpiry
hooks.description: Persisted state with a TTL.
hooks.signature: useLocalStorageWithExpiry<T>(key: string, initialValue: T, expiryMs: number): { value: T | null; setStoredValue: (value: T) => void }

hooks.name: useSessionStorage
hooks.description: useState backed by sessionStorage, synced across tabs.
hooks.signature: useSessionStorage<T>(key: string, initialValue: T | (() => T), options?: UseSessionStorageOptions<T>): [T, (value: T | ((prev: T) => T)) => void, () => void]

hooks.name: useReadLocalStorage
hooks.description: Read a localStorage key without writing it, reactively.
hooks.signature: useReadLocalStorage<T>(key: string, options?: UseReadLocalStorageOptions<T>): T | null

hooks.name: useDarkMode
hooks.description: Dark-mode boolean with toggle.

hooks.name: useTernaryDarkMode
hooks.description: Three-state dark mode — system, dark or light — persisted.

hooks.name: useBoolean
hooks.description: Boolean state with setTrue, setFalse, toggle and set.
hooks.signature: useBoolean(defaultValue?: boolean): { value: boolean; setValue: (value: boolean) => void; setTrue: () => void; setFalse: () => void; toggle: () => void }

hooks.name: useCounter
hooks.description: Numeric counter with increment, decrement and reset.
hooks.signature: useCounter(initialValue?: number): { count: number; increment: () => void; decrement: () => void; reset: () => void; setCount: Dispatch<SetStateAction<number>> }

hooks.name: useStep
hooks.description: 1-indexed step counter for wizards and steppers.

hooks.name: useCountdown
hooks.description: Self-stopping countdown or count-up timer.

hooks.name: useMap
hooks.description: Manage a Map as immutable React state.
hooks.signature: useMap<K, V>(initialState?: MapOrEntries<K, V>): [ReadOnlyMap<K, V>, UseMapActions<K, V>]

hooks.name: useDebounce
hooks.description: Debounces a changing value.

hooks.name: useDebounceValue
hooks.description: State whose debounced copy updates after a pause.
hooks.signature: useDebounceValue<T>(initialValue: T | (() => T), delayMs?: number, options?: DebounceOptions & { equalityFn?: (left: T, right: T) => boolean }): [T, DebouncedState<[T | ((prev: T) => T)], void>]

hooks.name: useDebounceCallback
hooks.description: Debounces a callback, with cancel, flush and isPending.
hooks.signature: useDebounceCallback<Args, R>(fn: (...args: Args) => R, delayMs?: number, options?: DebounceOptions): DebouncedState<Args, R>

hooks.name: useInterval
hooks.description: Runs a callback on a fixed interval; pause by passing null.
hooks.signature: useInterval(callback: () => void, delay: number | null): void

hooks.name: useTimeout
hooks.description: Runs a callback once after a delay; cancel by passing null.
hooks.signature: useTimeout(callback: () => void, delay: number | null): void

hooks.name: useIsomorphicLayoutEffect
hooks.description: useLayoutEffect on the client, useEffect on the server.

hooks.name: useEventCallback
hooks.description: A stable callback that always calls the latest closure.
hooks.signature: useEventCallback<Args extends unknown[], R>(fn: (...args: Args) => R): (...args: Args) => R

hooks.name: useUnmount
hooks.description: Runs a cleanup function once, when the component unmounts.

hooks.name: useIsClient
hooks.description: Reports false on the server and true after hydration.

hooks.name: useIsMounted
hooks.description: A stable getter for whether the component is still mounted.

hooks.name: useDocumentTitle
hooks.description: Keeps document.title in sync with a value, SSR-safe.

hooks.name: useEventListener
hooks.description: Subscribe to a window, document or element event with cleanup.
hooks.signature: useEventListener<K>(eventName: K, handler: (event: Event) => void, element?: RefObject<T>, options?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions): void

hooks.name: useClickOutside
hooks.description: Runs a callback on outside click.
hooks.signature: useClickOutside<T extends HTMLElement>(ref: RefObject<T>, callback: () => void): void

hooks.name: useMousePosition
hooks.description: Cursor coordinates within an element.
hooks.signature: useMousePosition<T extends HTMLElement>(ref: RefObject<T>): { x: number | null; y: number | null }

hooks.name: useInfiniteScroll
hooks.description: Triggers loading near the scroll end.

hooks.name: useExpandableText
hooks.description: Collapse long text by a character and/or line budget with a show-more toggle.
hooks.signature: useExpandableText<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(text: string, options?: UseExpandableTextOptions): UseExpandableTextResult<T>

hooks.name: useHover
hooks.description: Tracks whether the pointer is hovering an element.
hooks.signature: useHover<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(elementRef: RefObject<T>): boolean

hooks.name: useIntersectionObserver
hooks.description: Observe an element's viewport intersection reactively.

hooks.name: useResizeObserver
hooks.description: Measure an element's size reactively via ResizeObserver.
hooks.signature: useResizeObserver<T extends HTMLElement = HTMLElement>(ref: RefObject<T>, options?: UseResizeObserverOptions): ResizeObserverSize

hooks.name: useScrollLock
hooks.description: Lock and restore scrolling on the body or an element.

hooks.name: useClickAnyWhere
hooks.description: Run a handler on every click anywhere in the document.

hooks.name: useMediaQuery
hooks.description: Tracks whether a CSS media query currently matches.

hooks.name: useScreen
hooks.description: Tracks window.screen, refreshing it on every resize.

hooks.name: useWindowSize
hooks.description: Tracks the viewport's { width, height }, updated on resize.

hooks.name: useCopyToClipboard
hooks.description: Copy text to the clipboard, tracking the last copied value.

hooks.name: useScript
hooks.description: Load an external script and report its load status.
hooks.signature: useScript(src: string | null, options?: UseScriptOptions): UseScriptStatus

hooks.name: useFetch
hooks.description: Declarative fetch with loading and error status.
hooks.signature: useFetch<T>(url: string): { data: T | null; loading: boolean; error: Error | null }

hooks.name: useGeoLocation
hooks.description: Browser geolocation state.
hooks.signature: useGeoLocation(): { location: GeolocationPosition | null; error: GeolocationError | Error | null }

hooks.name: usePrevious
hooks.description: Track a value from the previous render.

hooks.name: useList
hooks.description: Array state with push, insert, update, remove, and clear helpers.

hooks.name: useSet
hooks.description: Set state with add, remove, toggle, has, and clear helpers.

hooks.name: useThrottle
hooks.description: Throttle a fast-changing value to at most one update per interval.

hooks.name: useUpdateEffect
hooks.description: A useEffect that skips the initial mount and runs only on updates.

hooks.name: useEffectOnce
hooks.description: Run an effect exactly once, on mount.

hooks.name: useKeyPress
hooks.description: Track whether a specific key is currently held down.

hooks.name: useWindowScroll
hooks.description: Track the window scroll position reactively.

hooks.name: useAsync
hooks.description: Run an async function and track its loading, error, and value state.

hooks.name: useMutation
hooks.description: Run an async write action on demand and track status, data, and error.
hooks.signature: useMutation<TArgs, TData>(mutationFn: (...args: TArgs) => Promise<TData>): UseMutationReturn<TArgs, TData>

hooks.name: usePagination
hooks.description: Page, page size, total pages, navigation helpers, and the current item range.

hooks.name: useNetworkState
hooks.description: Track online/offline status and connection details.

hooks.name: usePageVisibility
hooks.description: Track whether the page/tab is currently visible.

hooks.name: useIdle
hooks.description: Detect user inactivity after a configurable threshold.

hooks.name: useQueue
hooks.description: FIFO queue state with add, remove, clear, and first/last/size.

hooks.name: useDefault
hooks.description: useState that falls back to a default when the value is nullish.
hooks.signature: useDefault<T>(initialValue: T | null | undefined, defaultValue: T): [T, (value: T | null | undefined) => void]

hooks.name: useRafState
hooks.description: useState whose updates are batched to the next animation frame.

hooks.name: useDeepCompareEffect
hooks.description: useEffect that compares dependencies by deep structural equality.

hooks.name: useTextSelection
hooks.description: Track the text the user has currently selected on the page.

hooks.name: useLongPress
hooks.description: Detect a long press (mouse or touch) via spreadable handlers.
hooks.signature: useLongPress(callback: (event: MouseEvent | TouchEvent) => void, options?: UseLongPressOptions): UseLongPressHandlers

hooks.name: useHotkeys
hooks.description: Bind a keyboard shortcut combo (e.g. ctrl+k) to a callback.
hooks.signature: useHotkeys(keys: string, callback: (event: KeyboardEvent) => void): void

hooks.name: useFullscreen
hooks.description: Control the Fullscreen API for an element and track its state.
hooks.signature: useFullscreen<T extends HTMLElement>(ref: RefObject<T | null>): UseFullscreenReturn

hooks.name: useBattery
hooks.description: Read device battery level and charging state (where supported).

hooks.name: usePermission
hooks.description: Query a Permissions API permission and track its state.
